tasks.title: Fix the option parser to accept a repeated flag
tasks.prompt: The option parser drops all but the last value of a repeated --include flag. Make repeated --include flags accumulate into an array. Keep existing single-flag behavior. Run the test suite to confirm.

tasks.title: Update every caller of the parser for the new array shape
tasks.prompt: Now that --include returns an array, update every place that reads the parsed include value so it handles the array instead of a single string. Do not miss any caller. Run the full test suite.
